title: Home Screen WidgetKit Widget for Latest Threads and Unread Important Articles
description: Ship a WidgetKit Home Screen widget (small + medium) that surfaces the user's top 5 latest threads or unread important articles, rotating one per entry over hero images. Includes App Group + shared Keychain auth, AppIntent configuration, image downsampling, deep-link tap-through, and WidgetCenter-triggered reloads. The widget runs in a separate extension process, so the primary work is (1) establishing a shared auth foundation via App Group entitlements and migrated Keychain, (2) wiring shared source membership so the extension compiles against existing app models and networking, and (3) building the extension UI, provider, and routing on top of that foundation.
